source_intake_record.raw_question_text:
Hint: Please answer the question and provide the correct option letter, e.g., A, B, C, D, at the end.
Question: The following circuit has \( R = 10k\Omega \), \( C = 10\mu F \). The input voltage is a sinusoidal at 50 Hz with an rms value of 10 V. Under ideal conditions, the current \( i_s \) from the source in the circuit shown in <image> is 

Choices
A. \( 10\pi \) mA leading by 90%
B. \( 20\pi \) mA leading by 90%
C. 10 mA leading by 90%
D. 10 mA lagging by 90%
